name: Pizza Uno--12in Pan
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Mix as in bread dough and let rise, preferably overnight.
12-inch pan (deep dish):
1. Add 2-3 tbsp of oil to the pan.
2. Spread dough around the pan.
3. Build up the sides of the pan.
Filling: Lay the slices of cheese, add sausage, then the can of tomatoes, and sprinkle the top with oregano and grated Parmesan cheese.
Bake in a 500-degree oven until brown.
